steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The notation $h(3)$ means to use $3$ as the input for the function $h$. Substitute $x=3$ into $h(x)=x^3+7$:
$$
h(3)=3^3+7
$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: Compute the cube first, then add $7$: $$ h(3)=27+7 $$ $$ h(3)=34 $$ The answer is 34.
